Name: FShapedTextOptions
Description:
Common data for all widgets that use shaped text.
  Contains the common options that should be exposed for the underlying Slate widget.

Variables.Name: TextShapingMethod
Variables.Description: Which text shaping method should the text within this widget use? (unset to use the default returned by GetDefaultTextShapingMethod)

Variables.Name: TextFlowDirection
Variables.Description: Which text flow direction should the text within this widget use? (unset to use the default returned by GetDefaultTextFlowDirection)
